page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c56g1.14xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor. It features 56 dedicated physical cores running at 2.9 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, paired with 346.0 GB of system memory. The instance includes a single NVIDIA Ampere A10 GPU with 24 GB of VRAM. It does not include local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage options, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks demonstrate strong capabilities in multi-threaded decompression and cryptographic operations, with a PassMark CPU score of 51481.37 and a bzip3 multi-threaded decompression rate of 262.06 GB/sec, both placing in the top 25%. The system memory architecture delivers a read-only small block bandwidth of 2968.42 GB/sec. Most notably, the hardware configuration achieves top-tier performance in large language model inference, processing 135M model prompts at 9738.91 tokens per second and 7B model prompts at 2464.01 tokens per second.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the instance offers a dense allocation of dedicated physical compute cores and high-speed GPU memory, making it a viable option for workloads requiring parallel processing without the overhead of local storage maintenance. The lack of bundled local storage represents a tradeoff, requiring external storage configuration. This server is highly suited for deep learning inference, medium-scale language model execution, high-performance computing, and cryptographic processing.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c56g1.14xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 56 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores at 2.9 GHz and 346.0 GB of RAM. Equipped with a single NVIDIA Ampere A10 GPU providing 24 GB of VRAM, this instance is optimized for parallel computing tasks. It lacks local storage but delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. Benchmark results highlight top-tier performance in large language model inference, alongside strong multi-threaded decompression and cryptographic capabilities. This configuration is highly suited for AI inference, scientific computing, and database operations.

NVIDIA Ampere A10 GPU with 24 GB of dedicated VRAM
